risks.note: Concepts present in both English and Spanish artifact slugs in the same product nucleus.
Artifact local IDs are synonyms of canonical terms.
Two artifacts collapse to the same canonical id inside one product.
maturity field is required by doctrine but most existing artifacts have not been backfilled.
shared-concept-membership.json is specified but unpopulated; cross-product retrieval cannot run.
Orphan-detection audit not implemented yet; currently only declared as a contract.
Embedding model + store identity not declared; future RAG cannot freeze its surface.
Per-channel publication specs remain draft (carry-over from Phase 6).
